expected_behavior: The valid krn-review report fixture parses through @krn/contracts and includes required runtime artifact references plus memory selection/application evidence.
failure_mode: The krn review report contract can no longer validate its own canonical example.

expected_behavior: The known-bad fixture missing required memory/application fields and interpretation caveat fails deterministically.
failure_mode: The validator accepts a review report that can be overclaimed without a caveat.

expected_behavior: The CLI writes a proposal-only review report under .krn/review, selects local MemoryStore records from an external fixture store, applies memory guidance, and the generated report parses through @krn/contracts.
failure_mode: The krn review command no longer produces a schema-backed proposal-only runtime artifact.
